name: mediajel-tracker
description: MediaJel universal tracking tag — the deployable script served at tags.cnna.io.
//alias: Canonicalize @mediajel/* to the real package src (not the node_modules symlink) so a dynamically-imported module and its dynamic import() resolve to the SAME Parcel module id — otherwise intra-package dynamic imports resolve to undefined.
//scripts: Parcel runs under Node via scripts/run-parcel.mjs (Parcel's plugin loader uses a Node internal Bun lacks). Bun remains the package manager/workspace tool; node_modules is hoisted (see bunfig.toml). --no-scope-hoist is REQUIRED: with scope hoisting Parcel mis-assigns the dynamically-imported tracker-core modules (v1/v2 tracker, ecommerce, impressions) and import() resolves to undefined; disabling it keeps the tag's lazy code-splitting working.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n tag,server,page "node scripts/run-parcel.mjs watch src/index.ts --no-scope-hoist --port 1235" "bun run server/index.ts" "node scripts/run-parcel.mjs public/index.test.html --no-cache --port 1234"
